description: Comprehensive Master Static Syllabus for UPSC

topics.searchQuery: Constitutional Development Timeline UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Regulating Act 1773, Pitt's India Act 1784, and Charter Acts (1793-1853)
Government of India Acts 1858, 1919 (Diarchy), 1935 (Provincial Autonomy)
Indian Councils Acts 1861, 1892, and 1909 (Morley-Minto Reforms)

topics.topicName: Making & Salient Features of the Constitution
topics.searchQuery: Making of Indian Constitution UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Constituent Assembly composition, committees, and criticism
Sources of the Constitution (Borrowed features from world constitutions)
12 Schedules of Indian Constitution and details of structural provisions

topics.searchQuery: Preamble UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Sovereign, Socialist, Secular, Democratic, Republic, Justice, Liberty, Equality, Fraternity
Legal status and amendability (Berubari vs Kesavananda Bharati case)

topics.searchQuery: Union and Citizenship UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Articles 1 to 4, reorganization of states, Dhar/JVP committees & Fazl Ali Commission
Constitutional Provisions (Articles 5-11)
Citizenship Act 1955, modes of acquisition/loss, and CAA framework
OCI, PIO, and NRI legal differences and rights

topics.searchQuery: Fundamental Rights UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Right to Equality (Articles 14-18) with exceptions
Right to Freedom (Articles 19-22) and reasonable restrictions
Right against Exploitation & Freedom of Religion (Articles 23-28)
Minority Rights (Art 29-30) & Constitutional Remedies Writs (Art 32)
Basic Structure Doctrine and amendability of Part III

topics.searchQuery: DPSP and Fundamental Duties UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Socialistic, Gandhian, and Liberal-Intellectual Principles (Articles 36-51)

Article 51A, Swaran Singh Committee, Verma Committee, and enforceability

topics.searchQuery: Centre State Relations Federalism UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Legislative Relations (Articles 245-255) & Territorial jurisdiction
Administrative Relations (Articles 256-263) & All India Services control dynamics
Financial Relations (Articles 268-293), Finance Commission framework & GST impact

topics.searchQuery: Emergency Provisions Article 352 356 360 UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: National Emergency (Article 352): Grounds, approval, revocation & impact on FR (Art 358 vs 359)
President's Rule (Article 356) & Financial Emergency (Article 360): Scope, judicial review & Bommai Case parameters

topics.searchQuery: Union Executive President Prime Minister UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: President & Vice-President: Election, impeachment, powers (Pardoning & Ordinance making)
Prime Minister, Council of Ministers, and Cabinet Committees

topics.searchQuery: Parliament UPSC Polity

subtopics.subtopicName: Lok Sabha & Rajya Sabha: Composition, duration, and officers

topics.searchQuery: State Legislature and Governor UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: Governor: Appointment, constitutional/discretionary powers, and friction points

topics.topicName: Supreme Court, High Court & Subordinate Courts
topics.searchQuery: Indian Judiciary Supreme Court High Court UPSC

subtopics.subtopicName: 73rd Amendment Act: Compulsory and voluntary provisions, 11th Schedule
